features: Available in a wide variety of fragrances
Can easily be placed anywhere in the home for continuous, long-lasting freshness
Simple to use solid air freshener with no outlets or batteries needed
description: Product Description With a variety of fragrances to choose from, the Glade Solid Gel Air Freshener is the Ideally practical way to add continuous fragrance to your home. Just peel off the sticker to release the rich fragrance within. Directions Peel label tab off to desired level to activate. Peel off more or less to control the level of fragrance release.
